title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-Pro - UniFi Video Camera G5 Professional
description: The G5 Professional Bullet Camera from Ubiquiti is a camera with 8MP resolution (3840 x 2160px at 30 fps), really large 1/2" sensor, varifocal lens 4.1 to 12.3mm , motorized 3x optical zoom, viewing angle 35 to 110° , integrated high-performance infrared LEDs for night vision vision up to a distance of 25m, audio microphone , degree of protection IP65 against water and anti-vandal protection IK04.Camera for communication towards it uses only a 10/100 Mbps LAN port to connect to the network… UniFi Protect Controller is a powerful integrated IP video monitoring platform designed to work with UniFi Protect cameras and the UniFi Protect mobile app 4K resolution - 8MP, 3840 x 2160px at 30 fps 3x optical zoom IR illumination at a distance of 25m Event detection using AI Integrated audio microphone IP65 protection + anti-vandal IK04 Possibility of connecting additional accessories via USB-C Device Wall or mast holder Gripping material
